mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_error_log_m ( created_at, exception_class, exception_message, stack_trace, root_cause_class, err_code, http_status, http_method, api_path, request_id, actor_user_id, client_path, ip_addr, user_agent, app_profile, error_fingerprint, detail ) VALUES ( CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{exceptionClass}, #{exceptionMessage}, #{stackTrace}, #{rootCauseClass}, #{errCode}, #{httpStatus}, #{httpMethod}, #{apiPath}, #{requestId}, #{actorUserId}, #{clientPath}, #{ipAddr}, #{userAgent}, #{appProfile}, #{errorFingerprint}, CAST(#{detailJson} AS jsonb) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, created_at, exception_class, SUBSTRING(COALESCE(exception_message, '') FROM 1 FOR 500) AS exception_message, err_code, http_status, request_id, actor_user_id, api_path FROM om_error_log_m ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, created_at, exception_class, exception_message, stack_trace, root_cause_class, err_code, http_status, http_method, api_path, request_id, actor_user_id, client_path, ip_addr, user_agent, app_profile, error_fingerprint, detail::text AS detail_json FROM om_error_log_m WHERE id = #{id}
